overview.description: The NEOS Enhanced Income 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking regular income through a combination of stable, long-term, US Treasury bond exposure and income-enhancing options strategy, all within a tax-efficient framework. TLTI was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Neos.
